Interface ExposureConfigurer.AggregateResourceHttpMethodsFilter

Enclosing interface:
ExposureConfigurer
public static interface ExposureConfigurer.AggregateResourceHttpMethodsFilter
A filter to post-process the supported HTTP methods by aggregate resources (collection or item resource).
Since:
2.1
Author:
Oliver Gierke

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default org.springframework.data.rest.core.mapping.ComposableFilter<ResourceMetadata, ConfigurableHttpMethods>
    andThen(org.springframework.data.rest.core.mapping.ComposableFilter<ResourceMetadata, ConfigurableHttpMethods> filter)
     
    ConfigurableHttpMethods
    filter(ResourceMetadata metdata, ConfigurableHttpMethods httpMethods)
     
    static ExposureConfigurer.AggregateResourceHttpMethodsFilter
    none()
    Returns a default filter that just returns all HttpMethods as is, i.e. does not apply any filtering.

    • filter

      static ExposureConfigurer.AggregateResourceHttpMethodsFilter none()
      Returns a default filter that just returns all HttpMethods as is, i.e. does not apply any filtering.
